refreshCadence: N/A — not ingested. ATTOM offers real-time on-demand API access; the standard license caps local caching at 24 hours.
collectionMethod: Licensed provider (Order Form) — NOT public/official. API key required (free 30-day trial, then transaction-based custom enterprise pricing reported around $10k+/month for full nationwide). No key issued for this project.
licenseBlockers: Section 1.2: license is 'internal evaluation only' and excludes 'any form of commercial exploitation or revenue generation whatsoever' (rules out ad-supported public display).
Section 1.3(iii): prohibits 'using the ATTOM Products to create, enhance or structure any database in any form' (rules out ingestion into our store).
Section 1.3(iv): prohibits 'publishing ... or creating any product or service for sale or distribution to any third party' (rules out serving on a public website).
Section 1.3(vi): prohibits caching/storing ATTOM Content 'for a period of greater than twenty-four (24) hours' (rules out persistent storage).
Section 4.1: 90-day initial term; on termination customer must purge/delete and certify destruction.
protectedAddressHandling: No data imported. ATTOM offers property-owner name + situs/mailing address — the same county recorder/assessor data already sourced lawfully from official ArcGIS/Socrata parcel APIs.
nextStepToUnblock: A separately negotiated ATTOM Order Form must explicitly grant (a) commercial/ad-supported use, (b) database ingestion, (c) public redistribution/display, and (d) >24h persistent storage — rights the default terms expressly withhold. ATTOM markets to real estate/insurance/marketing, not public people-search, and may decline people-lookup use. Not worth pursuing unless a confirmed license is in hand; the underlying data duplicates official parcel sources already in use.
notes: Reference-only evaluation, recorded 2026-06-20 as part of the Incogni broker-list audit (ATTOM was the only licensed-aggregator candidate on that list). The ATTOM path is LICENSE-BLOCKED, not technology-blocked: the available ATTOM Developer Platform Terms (V07052018, updated 2024-11-21) prohibit every element of this product's use under the available license. Do not build an ATTOM adapter or call the ATTOM API under a trial/developer key for ingestion — doing so would breach Sections 1.2, 1.3(iii), 1.3(iv), and 1.3(vi).
